title: chore: update app metrics 2026-07-21
author: pollinations-ai[bot]
pr_body_excerpt: Daily automated update of app metrics, health checks, and greenhouse

gist.headline: Garden census, complete
gist.blurb: The greenhouse clipboard got its daily shuffle. App metrics and health checks are freshly counted, because even digital gardens need someone to walk the rows.
gist.summary: Updated the daily app metrics, health-check records, and greenhouse listings in apps/APPS.md and apps/GREENHOUSE.md for 2026-07-21.
gist.impact: Community maintainers have a current snapshot of listed apps and their greenhouse health status.
gist.visual_concept: A cozy community garden census: Polly, wearing a tiny gardener visor and carrying a clipboard, checks labeled code-plants while the eager CRT monitor robot reads app-health indicators from a small terminal. Rows of healthy flowers and vines represent the refreshed app directory and greenhouse records.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene of Polly, the cute yellow-and-brown striped bee mascot with pink cheek blush and light blue wings, wearing a tiny gardener visor and checking a clipboard beside code-plants with neat health tags; a friendly CRT monitor robot reads a lime green (#ecf874) terminal while flowers bloom around a greenhouse. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes, dark purple (#110518) details, small pixel-font sign reading "DAILY CHECK".
